svg.title: The Flood - Drowning in Brooms
svg.desc: Chaos. Groups of identical brooms moving in organized busy formations - each broom with two anthropomorphic arms carrying buckets and bundle bristles forked into walking legs. But there are SO MANY of them, the multiplication is overwhelming. Water sloshes and splashes everywhere in dramatic waves. In the center, a figure in blue robes (the apprentice - you) with a large exclamation mark over their head, surrounded and panicked. Red and orange sparkles flash frantically everywhere at different speeds. The background is shadowy and serious - darker, more ominous than before. Bold red text at bottom screams "STOP! PLEASE STOP!" with a fearful emoji. This is what losing control looks like.
